articles.title: Trust and Innovation Within the Firm: Evidence from Matched CEO-Firm Data*
articles.abstract: This article shows that a CEO’s trust enhances innovation within a firm, providing a novel micro-foundation for the well-known trust-growth relationship. I build a new matched CEO-firm-patent data set covering 5,753 CEOs in 3,598 U.S. public firms and 700,000 patents during 2000–2011. I exploit variation in generalized trust across CEO ethnic origins, inferred from their last names using deanonymized historical censuses. Following CEO turnovers, a one standard deviation increase in a CEO’s generalized trust is associated with 6% more future patents and 4%–6% higher average patent quality, driven entirely by higher-quality patents. Text analysis of employee reviews shows that the CEO’s trust enhances a firm’s trust culture. These results are consistent with insights from qualitative interviews suggesting that the CEO's trust and the firm’s trust culture encourage researchers to undertake high-risk explorative research and development. In addition, changes in the CEO’s bilateral trust toward inventors in different countries have comparable effects on inventors’ patenting, controlling for CEO and other fixed effects.
articles.title_cn: 公司内部的信任与创新：来自匹配的CEO-公司数据的证据*
articles.abstract_cn: 这篇文章表明，首席执行官（CEO）的信任可以增强公司内部的创新能力，为广为人知的信任与增长关系提供了一个新的微观基础。我构建了一个新的匹配的CEO-公司-专利数据集，涵盖了2000-2011年间3598家美国上市公司的5753位CEO和70万项专利。我利用CEO族裔起源中普遍信任的变化，这些变化是从他们的姓氏中推断出来的，使用的是去匿名化的历史人口普查数据。在CEO更替之后，CEO的普遍信任每增加一个标准差，与未来专利数量增加6%和平均专利质量提高4%-6%相关，这完全是由更高质量的专利驱动的。对员工评论的文本分析显示，CEO的信任增强了公司的信任文化。这些结果与定性访谈的见解一致，即CEO的信任和公司的信任文化鼓励研究人员进行高风险的探索性研究与开发。此外，控制CEO和其他固定效应后，CEO对不同国家发明家的双边信任变化对发明家的专利申请有类似的影响。

articles.title: Complete Pass-Through in Levels*
articles.abstract: Empirical studies find that the pass-through of input cost changes to prices is incomplete: a 10% increase in costs causes downstream prices to rise less than 10%, even at long horizons. Using microdata from gas stations, food products, and manufacturing industries, I find that incomplete pass-through in percentages often disguises
articles.abstract_cn: 实证研究发现，输入成本变化向价格的传递是不完全的：成本增加10%导致下游价格上升不到10%，即使在长期范围内也是如此。通过使用来自加油站、食品产品和制造业的微观数据，我发现百分比上的不完全传递常常掩盖了

articles.title: Monetary Policy and Sovereign Risk in Emerging Economies (NK-Default)*
articles.abstract: This article develops a New Keynesian model with sovereign default risk. Inflation is set by forward-looking firms, monetary policy is an interest rate rule, and the fiscal government borrows externally, long-term, with an option to default. In this framework, default risk creates inflation pressures through an expectations channel, and tight monetary policy disincentivizes fiscal overborrowing. The model sheds light on temporary inflation events in emerging-market data: short-lived spikes in inflation, spreads, and domestic policy rates. As spreads rise, firms increase their prices in expectation of higher future inflation and low consumption during default. Monetary policy tightens, which reduces inflation and helps bring spreads down by disciplining government borrowing. These monetary-fiscal interactions imply that delivering the flexible-prices allocation may not be optimal for monetary policy.
articles.title_cn: 货币政策与新兴经济体的主权风险（NK-违约）*
articles.abstract_cn: 本文构建了一个包含主权违约风险的新凯恩斯模型。通货膨胀由具有前瞻性的企业设定，货币政策遵循利率规则，财政政府通过外部借款长期债务，并有违约的选择权。在这个框架下，违约风险通过预期渠道产生通胀压力，紧缩的货币政策抑制财政过度借贷。该模型揭示了新兴市场数据中的临时通胀事件：通货膨胀、利差和国内政策利率的短期飙升。随着利差的上升，企业预期未来通胀上升和违约期间消费低迷，从而提高价格。货币政策收紧，这降低了通胀，并通过对政府借贷进行纪律约束，帮助降低利差。这些货币财政互动意味着，实现灵活价格分配可能并非货币政策的最佳选择。

articles.title: The Macroeconomic Impact of Climate Change: Global Versus Local Temperature*
articles.abstract: This article estimates that the macroeconomic damages from climate change are an order of magnitude larger than previously thought. Exploiting natural global temperature variability, we find that 1ºC warming reduces world GDP by over 20% in the long run. Global temperature correlates strongly with extreme climatic events, unlike country-level temperature used in previous work, explaining our larger estimate. We use this evidence to estimate damage functions in a neoclassical growth model. Business-as-usual warming implies a present welfare loss of more than 30%, and a social cost of carbon in excess of $1,200 per ton. These impacts suggest that unilateral decarbonization policy is cost-effective for large countries such as the United States.
articles.title_cn: 气候变化的宏观经济影响：全球与局部温度*
articles.abstract_cn: 这篇文章估计，气候变化对宏观经济造成的损害比之前认为的要大一个数量级。利用全球自然温度变化，我们发现1摄氏度的升温在长期内将使世界GDP减少超过20%。全球气温与极端气候事件强烈相关，与之前工作中使用的国家层面的温度不同，这解释了我们更大的估计值。我们利用这些证据在新古典增长模型中估计损害函数。按照目前的全球变暖趋势，意味着当前福利损失超过30%，每吨碳的社会成本超过1200美元。这些影响表明，对于像美国这样的大国来说，单边的去碳化政策是成本效益的。

articles.title: Civil War–Induced Displacement and Human Capital*
articles.abstract: We study the effect of conflict-induced displacement on human capital and occupational shifts, focusing on the Mozambican civil war (1977–1992), during which millions of civilians were forced to flee to the countryside, cities, and neighboring countries. Reconstructing the wartime mobility histories of the surviving population, we examine the consequences of multiple displacement trajectories in a unified framework. First, we characterize the education and sectoral employment of the universe of (non-)displaced. Second, we exploit differences in relocation trajectories among extended kin members during their schooling years. Displacement is associated with significant gains in education. Third, using a movers design, we show that minors displaced earlier to better districts experienced an increase in educational attainment. Focusing on moves during the intensification of the war and when comparing members of the same household, regional childhood exposure effects remain strong, whereas spatial sorting becomes negligible. Fourth, we jointly estimate place-based, spatial sorting, and uprootedness effects, showing that all forces are at play. Fifth, a small survey in Mozambique’s largest northern city reveals long-term effects: internally displaced people report higher education than their siblings who stayed behind but lower social capital and worse mental health relative to locals. Our findings demonstrate that displacement shocks can foster human capital accumulation, even in very low-income settings, albeit at the cost of enduring social and psychological traumas.
articles.title_cn: 内战引发的流离失所与人力资本*
articles.abstract_cn: 我们研究了冲突引起的流离失所对人力资本和职业转变的影响，重点关注莫桑比克内战（1977-1992年），在这场战争中，数百万平民被迫逃往农村、城市和邻国。我们重建了幸存者的战时流动史，在一个统一的框架下检验了多重流离失所轨迹的后果。首先，我们描述了（非）流离失所者的受教育程度和行业就业情况。其次，我们利用在学龄期间扩展亲属成员之间的搬迁轨迹差异。流离失所与教育的显著增长相关联。第三，使用搬迁者设计，我们展示了早期被安置到更好地区的未成年人在教育成就上有所提高。专注于战争加剧期间的搬迁，以及比较同一家庭的成员时，区域性童年暴露效应仍然很强，而空间排序变得微不足道。第四，我们联合估计了基于地点、空间排序和连根拔起效应，表明所有力量都在起作用。第五，在莫桑比克最大的北部城市进行的一项小型调查显示了长期效应：国内流离失所者报告的教育水平高于他们留守的兄弟姐妹，但相对于当地人，他们的社会资本更低，心理健康更差。我们的发现表明，即使在非常低收入的环境中，流离失所冲击也可以促进人力资本的积累，尽管这是以持久的社会和心理创伤为代价的。

articles.title: Disaggregated Economic Accounts*
articles.abstract: We develop a system of disaggregated economic accounts. The system breaks down national accounting positions into bilateral flows between consistently defined groups of consumers (consumer cells), groups of producers (producer cells), the government, and the rest of the world. We disaggregate the full circular flow of money, including consumer spending, labor compensation, firm profits, intermediates trade, foreign trade, and government transactions, while satisfying all national accounting identities. We implement the disaggregated system for small region-by-industry cells in Denmark and present stylized facts, such as variation in domestic spending, local and urban bias in consumer spending, and a pattern of triangular flows across regions. Cell-level measures of spending intensity capture how much spending by a cell contributes to the income of cells experiencing unemployment after a shock. Using a general equilibrium model, we show that fiscal transfers raise aggregate GDP by more when they target cells with high spending intensity on unemployed cells. The disaggregated economic accounts help governments select more effective policies.
articles.abstract_cn: 我们开发了一套分部门的经济核算体系。该体系将国民核算的账目分解为在消费者（消费者单元）、生产者（生产者单元）、政府以及与世界其他地区之间一致定义的群体之间的双边流动。我们在满足所有国民核算恒等式的同时，分解了包括消费支出、劳动报酬、企业利润、中间品贸易、外贸以及政府交易在内的完整货币循环流动。我们在丹麦为小区域-行业单元实施了分部门系统，并提出了一些典型事实，如国内支出的变化、消费者支出的地方和城市偏好，以及各地区之间三角流动的模式。单元级别的支出强度度量捕捉了一个单元的支出对经历冲击后失业单元收入的贡献程度。利用一般均衡模型，我们展示了财政转移支付在针对高支出强度单元的失业单元时，能更有效地提高总体GDP。分部门的经济核算体系帮助政府选择更有效的政策。

articles.title: Insuring Peace: Index-Based Livestock Insurance, Droughts, and Conflict*
articles.abstract: We provide quasi-experimental evidence of how an innovative market-based solution using remote-sensing technology can mitigate drought-induced conflict. Droughts are a major driver of conflict in Africa, particularly between transhumant pastoralists and sedentary farmers. Index-Based Livestock Insurance (IBLI), a program piloted in Kenya, provides automated, preemptive payouts to pastoralists affected by droughts. Combining variation in rainfall and the staggered rollout of IBLI in Kenya over 2000–2020, we find that IBLI strongly reduces drought-induced conflict. Key mechanisms include a reduction in herd sizes, as well as income smoothing and asset price stabilization, contributing to an overall reduced migratory pressure for pastoralists. Our study suggests that market-based solutions are a scalable, cost-effective pathway to mitigate conflict, complementing political solutions such as power-sharing agreements and institutional reforms.
articles.title_cn: 保障和平：基于指数的家畜保险、干旱与冲突*
articles.abstract_cn: 我们提供了一种创新的基于市场的解决方案，使用遥感技术来减轻由干旱引起的冲突的准实验证据。干旱是非洲冲突的主要驱动因素，特别是在游牧民族和定居农民之间。基于指数的牲畜保险（IBLI）是一项在肯尼亚试行的计划，为受干旱影响的牧民提供自动化、预防性的赔付。结合肯尼亚2000-2020年降雨量的变化和IBLI的分阶段推广，我们发现IBLI大大减少了由干旱引起的冲突。关键机制包括减少畜群规模，以及收入平滑和资产价格稳定，有助于减轻牧民的整体迁移压力。我们的研究表明，基于市场的解决方案是减轻冲突的可扩展、成本效益高的途径，补充了权力分享协议和机构改革等政治解决方案。

articles.title: Automation and Rent Dissipation: Implications for Wages, Inequality, and Productivity*
articles.abstract: This article studies the effects of automation in a task-based economy in which some jobs pay workers rents—wages above workers' outside options. We show that automation targets high-rent tasks, dissipating rents, amplifying wage losses, and reducing within-group wage dispersion in exposed groups. This form of rent dissipation is inefficient and offsets the productivity gains from automation. Using U.S. data from 1980 to 2016, we find evidence of sizable rent dissipation and reduced within-group wage dispersion due to automation. Automation accounts for 52% of the increase in between-group inequality since 1980, with rent dissipation explaining one-fifth of this total. Our estimates imply that inefficient rent dissipation has offset 60%–90% of the productivity gains from automation over this period.
articles.title_cn: 自动化与租金耗散：对工资、不平等和生产力的影响*
articles.abstract_cn: 这篇文章研究了在基于任务的经济中自动化的影响，其中一些工作为工人支付租金——即高于工人其他选择的工资。我们表明，自动化针对的是高租金任务，消耗租金，放大工资损失，并减少受影响群体内部的工资差异。这种租金消耗是低效的，并且抵消了自动化带来的生产率提升。利用1980年至2016年的美国数据，我们发现了由于自动化导致的大量租金消耗和群体内部工资差异的减少。自动化解释了自1980年以来群体间不平等增加的52%，其中租金消耗解释了这一总数的五分之一。我们的估计意味着，低效的租金消耗抵消了这一时期自动化带来的60%至90%的生产率提升。

articles.title: A Theory of How Workers Keep up with Inflation*
articles.abstract: We develop a model that integrates modern theories of labor market flows with nominal wage rigidities to study the consequences of inflation on the labor market. Nominal wage stickiness incentivizes workers to engage in job-to-job transitions after an unexpected increase in the price level. Such dynamics lead to a rise in aggregate vacancies associating a seemingly tight labor market with lower real wages—two facts observed during the recent inflation period. The calibrated model jointly matches aggregate and cross-sectional trends in worker flows and wages during the 2021–2024 period. Using historical data, we show that prior periods of high inflation were also associated with increasing vacancies and upward shifts in the Beveridge curve. Our results suggest that policy makers and academics should be cautious about viewing the rise in the vacancy-to-unemployment rate as a sign of a tight labor market during inflationary periods without holistically looking at other labor market indicators.
articles.title_cn: 工人如何应对通货膨胀的理论*
articles.abstract_cn: 我们构建了一个模型，将现代劳动力流动理论与名义工资刚性结合起来，研究通货膨胀对劳动力市场的影响。名义工资粘性激励工人在价格水平意外上升后进行工作转换。这种动态导致总体空缺职位增加，将看似紧张的劳动力市场与较低的实际工资联系起来——这两个事实在最近的通货膨胀期间被观察到。校准后的模型同时匹配了2021-2024年期间工人流动和工资的总体和横截面趋势。利用历史数据，我们展示了高通胀前期也与空缺职位增加和贝弗里奇曲线的向上移动相关。我们的结果表明，政策制定者和学者在通货膨胀时期，不应仅凭空缺职位与失业率的上升就将之视为劳动力市场紧张的迹象，而应全面考虑其他劳动力市场指标。

articles.title: How Do You Identify a Good Manager?*
articles.abstract: We introduce and validate a novel approach to identifying good managers. In a preregistered lab experiment, we causally identify managerial contributions by randomly assigning managers to teams and controlling for individual skill. We find that manager contributions are crucial for team success, and that people who self-select into management roles perform worse than randomly assigned managers. Managerial performance is strongly predicted by economic decision-making skill but not by demographic characteristics. Two validation studies support our experimental results. Participants who succeed in the lab receive more real-world promotions and, in a separate study of retail store managers, skill measures strongly predict store sales. A one standard deviation increase in manager quality increases annual per store sales by US$4.1 million (25% increase). Selecting managers on skills rather than demographic characteristics or the desire to lead could substantially improve organizational performance.
articles.title_cn: 如何识别一个优秀的管理者？
articles.abstract_cn: 我们引入并验证了一种识别优秀管理者的新方法。在一个预先注册的实验室实验中，我们通过随机将管理者分配给团队并控制个人技能，因果地识别了管理贡献。我们发现管理者的贡献对团队成功至关重要，而那些自我选择进入管理角色的人比随机分配的管理者表现更差。管理绩效强烈地由经济决策技能预测，而不是由人口统计特征预测。两项验证研究支持我们的实验结果。在实验室中成功的参与者在现实世界中获得更多的晋升机会，而在另一项关于零售店管理者的研究中，技能测量强烈预测了商店销售额。管理者质量每提高一个标准差，每年每家商店的销售额增加410万美元（增长25%）。选择基于技能而非人口统计特征或领导愿望的管理者，可以显著提高组织绩效。

articles.title: (Not) Thinking About the Future: Financial Information and Maternal Labor Supply*
articles.abstract: Does information about the long-run financial costs of reduced labor supply increase mothers’ working hours? We document descriptively that long-term financial factors are not top of mind when mothers decide on their employment level. Moreover, a substantial share of women holds overly optimistic expectations about pension receipt and wage growth under part-time work. In a large-scale field experiment in Switzerland, we randomly assign mothers working part-time as teachers to receive objective information about the long-run costs of reduced labor supply. The treatment increases both demand for financial information and future labor supply plans, in particular among women who underestimate the costs of part-time work. Leveraging linked employer administrative data one year post-intervention, we find that this group of mothers increases working hours by 7%. These findings underscore that policies reducing information frictions in labor supply decisions may help address remaining gender gaps in the labor market.
articles.title_cn: （不）考虑未来：财务信息与母亲的劳动供给*
articles.abstract_cn: 关于减少劳动力供应的长期财务成本的信息是否会增加母亲的工作时间？我们描述性地记录了长期财务因素并不是母亲决定就业水平时首要考虑的问题。此外，相当一部分女性对兼职工作下的养老金领取和工资增长持有过于乐观的预期。在瑞士进行的一项大规模实地实验中，我们随机分配兼职工作的教师母亲接收有关减少劳动力供应长期成本的客观信息。这种处理增加了对财务信息的需求和未来劳动力供应计划，特别是在那些低估兼职工作成本的女性中。利用与雇主行政数据相连的数据，在干预后一年，我们发现这群母亲增加了7%的工作时间。这些发现强调，减少劳动力供应决策中的信息摩擦的政策可能有助于解决劳动力市场中仍然存在的性别差距。

articles.title: The Future in Mind: Aspirations and Long-Term Outcomes in Rural Ethiopia*
articles.abstract: Aspirations may condition the future-oriented choices of individuals and thus may play a role in the persistence of poverty or the effort to break out of it. We run a randomized controlled trial in remote, rural Ethiopia to explore this and evaluate an intervention that aims to change how poor people perceive their future opportunities, alter their aspirations, and through that, modify their investment decisions. A treatment group was shown video documentaries featuring individuals from similar communities who escaped poverty through their own efforts and who serve as relatable role models. Five years after the screening took place, the treated households had increased future-oriented investments in agriculture, children’s education, and assets. The results can be explained by an increase in aspirations in terms of lifetime goals. Overall, this research uniquely provides evidence that a light-touch behavioural intervention can have persistent economic impacts on a poor population.
articles.title_cn: 心中未来：埃塞俄比亚农村的抱负与长期结果*
articles.abstract_cn: 抱负可能会影响个人面向未来的选择，从而在贫困的持续或努力摆脱贫困中发挥作用。我们在偏远的埃塞俄比亚农村进行了一项随机对照试验，以探索这一点，并评估旨在改变穷人对未来机会的看法、改变他们的抱负，并通过这种方式改变他们的投资决策的干预措施。一个治疗组被展示了视频纪录片，这些纪录片展示了来自类似社区的个体，他们通过自己的努力摆脱了贫困，并成为可关联的榜样。在放映发生五年后，接受治疗的家庭增加了对农业、儿童教育和资产的未来导向投资。这些结果可以通过抱负在终身目标方面的增加来解释。总体而言，这项研究独特地提供了证据，表明轻微的行为干预可以对贫困人口产生持久的经济影响。

articles.title: Leveraging Virtual Contact and Social Networks to Foster Interethnic Harmony*
articles.abstract: This article investigates whether virtual contact, initiated through a documentary film, can promote interethnic harmony. We carried out a cluster-randomized field experiment involving over 3,300 households across 121 multiethnic villages in Bangladesh. We find that a documentary film, designed to humanize the ethnic-minority Santals and evoke empathy among the ethnic majority Bengalis, increased the ethnic majority’s prosociality toward minorities, though the strength of the evidence varies by treatment arm and outcome. Using emotion-detecting software to analyze facial expressions during the film viewing suggests that the documentary elicited emotional responses consistent with empathy. We do not find evidence that the intervention reduced the prevalence of negative stereotypes and discriminatory opinions toward minorities. In villages assigned to target network-central people, we find positive behavioral effects on untreated individuals, including Santals, and village-level administrative data suggest a reduction in police complaints in those villages. About five months after the intervention, we conducted a casual-work field experiment involving 720 participants from the main intervention. In this task, pairs of ethnic-majority and minority participants jointly produced paper bags for a local supplier under a piece-rate compensation scheme. We find positive treatment effects on productivity for both ethnic groups, with effects concentrated in villages where network-central people were treated. For the ethnic majority, increased prosociality, and for the ethnic minority, reciprocity or peer pressure may have contributed to increased productivity. Overall, our findings suggest that virtual contact and social networks may help promote harmony in multiethnic communities.
articles.title_cn: 利用虚拟接触和社交网络促进族际和谐*
articles.abstract_cn: 这篇文章研究了通过纪录片电影发起的虚拟接触是否能够促进不同种族间的和谐。我们在孟加拉国121个多民族村庄中对超过3300户家庭进行了集群随机现场实验。我们发现，一部旨在人性化少数民族桑塔尔人并引发多数民族孟加拉人的同情心的纪录片电影，增加了多数民族对少数群体的亲社会行为，尽管证据的强度因处理组和结果的不同而异。使用情感检测软件分析观影期间的面部表情表明，该纪录片引发了与同情心一致的情感反应。我们没有发现证据表明这种干预减少了对少数群体的负面刻板印象和歧视性观点。在被指定针对网络中心人物的村庄中，我们发现对未处理个体，包括桑塔尔人，有积极的行为效果，村庄级别的行政数据表明这些村庄的警察投诉有所减少。在干预大约五个月之后，我们进行了一个涉及720名主要干预参与者的临时工作现场实验。在这个任务中，来自主要干预的多数民族和少数族裔参与者配对，为当地供应商共同生产纸袋，采用计件补偿方案。我们发现对两个民族群体的生产力都有积极的影响，这些影响集中在网络中心人物被处理的村庄。对于多数民族来说，增加的亲社会行为，对于少数族裔来说，互惠或同伴压力可能有助于提高生产力。总体而言，我们的发现表明，虚拟接触和社交网络可能有助于促进多民族社区的和谐。

articles.title: Growth Experiences and Trust in Government*
articles.abstract: This article explores the relationship between economic growth and trust in government using variation in GDP growth experienced over a lifetime since birth. We assemble a newly harmonized global data set across 11 major opinion surveys, comprising 3.3 million respondents in 166 countries since 1990. Exploiting cohort-level variation, we find that people who have experienced higher GDP growth are more prone to trust their governments, with larger effects found in democracies. Higher-growth experiences are also associated with improved perceptions of government performance and living standards. We find no similar channel between growth experience and interpersonal trust. Second, more recent growth experiences appear to matter most for trust in government, with no detectable effect of growth experienced during one’s formative years, closer to birth, or before birth. Third, we find evidence of a “trust paradox” whereby average trust in government is lower in democracies than in autocracies. Our results are robust to a range of falsification exercises, robustness checks, and single-country evidence using the American National Election Studies and the Swiss Household Panel.
articles.title_cn: 成长经历与对政府的信任*
articles.abstract_cn: 这篇文章探讨了经济增长与对政府信任之间的关系，利用自出生以来一生中经历的GDP增长的变化。我们汇编了一个新近协调的全球数据集，涵盖了自1990年以来的11个主要民意调查，包括166个国家的330万受访者。利用队列级别的变化，我们发现那些经历过更高GDP增长的人更倾向于信任他们的政府，这种效应在民主国家中更为明显。更高的增长经历也与对政府绩效和生活水平的改善感知相关联。我们发现增长经历与人际信任之间没有类似的渠道。其次，最近的增长经历似乎对政府信任最为重要，而在形成期、出生前后或出生前经历的增长对政府信任没有可检测的影响。第三，我们发现了一个“信任悖论”，即民主国家的平均政府信任度低于独裁国家。我们的结果对一系列证伪练习、稳健性检查以及使用美国国家选举研究和瑞士家庭小组的单个国家证据都是稳健的。

articles.title: Changing Opportunity: Sociological Mechanisms Underlying Growing Class Gaps and Shrinking Race Gaps in Economic Mobility*
articles.abstract: We show that intergenerational mobility changed rapidly by race and class in recent decades in the United States and study the causal mechanisms underlying those changes. Between the 1978 and 1992 birth cohorts, earnings increased for white children from high-income families relative to white children from low-income families, increasing earnings gaps by parental income (class) by 30%. Earnings increased for Black children at all parental income levels, reducing white-Black earnings gaps for children from low-income families by 30%. Class gaps grew and race gaps shrank similarly for nonmonetary outcomes such as educational attainment, standardized test scores, and mortality rates. Using a quasi-experimental design, we show that the divergent trends in economic mobility were caused by differential changes in childhood environments, as proxied by parental employment rates, in local communities defined by race, class, and childhood county. Outcomes improve across birth cohorts for children who grow up in communities with increasing parental employment rates, with larger effects for children who move to such communities at younger ages. Children’s outcomes are most strongly related to the parental employment rates of peers they are more likely to interact with, such as those in their own birth cohort, suggesting that the relationship between children’s outcomes and parental employment rates is mediated by social interaction.
articles.title_cn: 变化的机会：社会学机制下的阶级差距扩大与种族差距缩小在经济流动性中的作用*
articles.abstract_cn: 我们展示了近几十年来美国不同种族和阶级之间的代际流动性发生了快速变化，并研究了这些变化背后的因果机制。在1978年和1992年出生的队列之间，来自高收入家庭的白人儿童的收入相对于来自低收入家庭的白人儿童增加了，使得按父母收入（阶级）划分的收入差距增加了30%。黑人儿童在所有父母收入水平上的收入都有所增加，使得来自低收入家庭的儿童的白人-黑人收入差距减少了30%。对于非货币结果，如教育程度、标准化考试成绩和死亡率，阶级差距增长和种族差距缩小的趋势也类似。通过使用准实验设计，我们展示了经济流动性中不同趋势是由不同种族、阶级和儿童县定义的当地社区中父母就业率的差异变化所引起的。对于在父母就业率增加的社区长大的儿童，他们在不同出生队列中的成果有所改善，对于那些在更年轻的时候搬到这样社区的儿童，效果更大。儿童的结果与他们更有可能与之互动的同龄人的父母就业率最密切相关，例如那些与他们同一出生队列的人，这表明儿童结果与父母就业率之间的关系是通过社会互动来调节的。
